Back to Probability & Statistics
20223 HoursFM: 60 | PM: 24

Probability & Statistics

CACS202 · Third Semester · Tribhuvan University · BCA

This question paper contains Group A (MCQs), Group B (Short Answer), and Group C (Long Answer) questions. View the question paper PDF directly in your browser, or download it for offline study. The answer sheet includes detailed solutions, code examples, and diagrams.

About Answer Sheets

Each answer sheet includes the complete question rewritten for reference, followed by detailed step-by-step solutions. Programming questions include working code examples. Questions requiring diagrams (ER diagrams, flowcharts, circuit diagrams, etc.) include properly labeled illustrations.
